label: Sketch resolver
description: Defines a sketch generation resolver used to build map-generation sketches.

resolver.label: Resolver
resolver.description: SketchResolver object that performs the generation work. The Class attribute selects the concrete C# resolver class.

isRoot.label: Is root
isRoot.description: Whether this resolver can be used as a top-level sketch generation root.

basic.label: Basic sketch resolver
basic.description: Creates a SketchResolverDef with a resolver class and optional root flag.
